name: plugdev
description: Test Minecraft plugins in one command. Starts a real server with your plugin, opens Minecraft, and reloads when you save. Works with Paper, Folia, Purpur, Pufferfish, and Spigot.

scripts.build: npm run build:bootstrap && npm run build -w @plugdev/cli && npm run build -w @plugdev/mcp
scripts.build:bootstrap: cd packages/bootstrap-paper && (if exist gradlew.bat (gradlew.bat build -q) else ./gradlew build -q)
scripts.test: npm run test -w @plugdev/cli && npm run test -w @plugdev/mcp
